fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> describing the Vulkan component swizzle mapping for this conversion.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the component swizzle mapping used by this YCbCr conversion.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the sampler filter must match the chroma filter; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the sampler filter must match the chroma filter.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if linear filtering is supported for this YCbCr conversion; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether linear filtering is supported for this YCbCr conversion.
